name: tabula-mcp
description: Work with people and AI agents in shared Tabula.md Markdown workspaces.
long_description: Tabula.md MCP lets Claude join a shared multi-file Markdown workspace as an agent collaborator. It can inspect bounded context, read documents, publish presence, and apply hash-guarded workspace changes. Local documents are checkpointed as plaintext on this machine for local recovery. Room keys from invite URL fragments stay local, while the Tabula Room server receives only encrypted envelopes.

tools.name: tabula_create_document
tools.description: Create a local Tabula.md Markdown document and open the interactive MCP App editor.

tools.name: tabula_list_documents
tools.description: List local Tabula.md document checkpoints saved by this MCP server.

tools.name: tabula_open_document
tools.description: Open the latest or selected local Tabula.md document checkpoint in the MCP App editor.

tools.name: tabula_read_me
tools.description: Read Tabula.md MCP workflow guidance and security boundaries.

tools.name: tabula_share_document
tools.description: Export a local Tabula.md document as an encrypted JSON snapshot link.

tools.name: tabula_create_workspace
tools.description: Create a local Tabula workspace from inline Markdown files.

tools.name: tabula_import_markdown_workspace
tools.description: Import Markdown files into a local Tabula workspace from inline files or an allowed local root.

tools.name: tabula_share_workspace
tools.description: Export a local Tabula workspace as an encrypted JSON snapshot link.

tools.name: tabula_create_workspace_room
tools.description: Create a new encrypted Tabula.md live workspace room from a local workspace and save an encrypted checkpoint when Firebase is configured.

tools.name: tabula_connect_room
tools.description: Join an encrypted Tabula.md room invite URL. Claude can receive state from an active browser peer without checkpoint persistence; Firebase recovery is optional.

tools.name: tabula_list_sessions
tools.description: List encrypted Tabula.md room sessions connected in this local MCP process.

tools.name: tabula_read_workspace
tools.description: Read the latest Tabula workspace tree metadata from a connected room.

tools.name: tabula_read_workspace_document
tools.description: Read cached Markdown for one document in a connected Tabula workspace room.

tools.name: tabula_read_workspace_context
tools.description: Read filtered, bounded Markdown excerpts from cached workspace documents for agent planning.

tools.name: tabula_apply_workspace_changes
tools.description: Apply hash-guarded workspace document changes as encrypted direct collaboration events.

tools.name: tabula_room_status
tools.description: Inspect connection state, collaborators, hashes, and write mode.

tools.name: tabula_open_room_view
tools.description: Open a connected room inside the Tabula.md MCP App for status, outline, Markdown preview, refresh, fullscreen, and selection handoff.

tools.name: tabula_set_presence
tools.description: Publish this local MCP client's cursor or selection presence to collaborators.

tools.name: tabula_wait_for_changes
tools.description: Wait for active document hash changes or encrypted workspace room events and return document hash summaries.

tools.name: tabula_disconnect_room
tools.description: Disconnect one encrypted Tabula.md room session from this local MCP process.
